page_metadata.biotools__summary: This software recognizes molecular voids in the van der Waals surface or the Lee-Richards (solvent accessible) surface and computes their mass properties such the volume and the boundary area.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This software recognizes molecular voids in the van der Waals surface or the Lee-Richards (solvent accessible) surface and computes their mass properties such the volume and the boundary area.
